underlying_goal: Execute phase 6 (Content Normalization) of a project roadmap using a custom GSD workflow system - plan, execute, verify, and fix gaps
friction_detail: Missing beautifulsoup4 dependency and test fixture isolation bug required a gap closure cycle; verifier agent got stuck and had to be manually stopped.
brief_summary: User ran phase 6 planning and execution via GSD workflow commands, Claude orchestrated research/plan/execute/verify cycles across multiple subagents, found and fixed a missing dependency gap, completing the phase successfully.
